subject: Physics
title: Every Action Has a Reaction
description: Learn Every Action Has a Reaction in one minute.

hook.text: When you jump, you push Earth down and Earth pushes you up. Newton's third law works both ways.

buildup.text: Every force comes in a pair. Push a wall, and the wall pushes back with equal strength.

discovery.text: Rockets work this way. Exhaust blasts downward, and the reaction force pushes the rocket up.

twist.text: The pairs act on different objects. Earth pushes you up, you push Earth—but Earth barely moves.

climax.text: Without the third law, walking is impossible. Your foot pushes ground, ground pushes you forward.

punchline.text: Every push gets a push back. The universe always balances.

quiz.question: How do rockets work according to Newton's third law?
options: Exhaust pushes down, reaction force pushes rocket up
Rockets push against the air around them
Fuel creates a magnetic lift force
